retrieved_note: Verified 2026-05-25 against bankalhabib.com product pages, SOC Jan-Jun 2026 (Inst Cir.# 180 dated 2025-11-27), SOC Jul-Dec 2026 (Inst Cir.# 093 dated 2026-05-21), the 2025 Credit Card Summary Box, and underlying account KFS PDFs (Apna/Asaan/Digital/Woman).

notes: Annual fee verified at PKR 6,500 (primary) / PKR 3,000 (supplementary) in both the 2025 Summary Box and the SOC Jan-Jun 2026 (Section IX. CREDIT CARD).
Minimum income for salaried applicants is PKR 20,000/month per the public eligibility section on /credit-cards; self-employed minimum is PKR 25,000/month.
Age range for salaried applicants is 21-60 years per /credit-cards; self-employed 21-65; supplementary 18-70.
Previously inferred PKR 25,000 'minimum_relationship_balance' was unsourced and has been removed; the SOC does not impose a relationship-balance condition on the credit card.

No annual-fee waiver published for the Jan-Jun 2026 period. The Jul-Dec 2026 SOC introduces a fee-reversal incentive (PKR 800 reduced fee on spending PKR 150,000 within 60 days, full reversal on PKR 200,000 within 90 days) but that is future-dated.
Annual fee verified at PKR 4,500 (primary) / PKR 2,000 (supplementary) in both the 2025 Summary Box and the SOC Jan-Jun 2026.
Salaried minimum income PKR 20,000/month (PKR 25,000 if self-employed). Age 21-60 salaried; 21-65 self-employed.
Previously inferred PKR 25,000 'minimum_relationship_balance' was unsourced and has been removed.
No annual-fee waiver in the period that covers today (Jan-Jun 2026).

Eligibility verified on the public /debit-cards page: 'Monthly salary PKR 750,000 & Above' (salaried) OR PKR 2,000,000 deposit at issuance (new) / PKR 2,000,000 average monthly balance for 180 days (existing).
Annual fee verified at PKR 22,000 primary AND PKR 22,000 supplementary in the SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Section III (and matched by the dedicated Signature SOC page).

No published annual-fee waiver in primary BAHL sources. The Signature Account page mentions PKR 3,000,000 monthly average balance is the threshold above which a separate Rs. 1,500/month Account Maintenance Charge is waived, but that is an account-level maintenance rule, not a card-fee waiver, so it is not set on this card.
Previously claimed 'Waived if PKR 3,000,000 average monthly balance maintained for 180 days' could not be sourced to any BAHL page and is removed.

Eligibility on /debit-cards: 'Monthly salary PKR 150,000 & Above' for new customers; 'PKR 200,000 average deposit' for existing customers (treated as min_deposit for new / min_average_balance for existing).
Annual fee verified at PKR 9,000 primary / PKR 6,500 supplementary in the SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Section III.
Card is account-linked to an underlying BAHL current/savings account (Apna/Current/Digital); income document is not separately required for the card.
Annual fee verified at PKR 4,500 primary / PKR 3,500 supplementary in the SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Section III.

Card is account-linked (issued on Current / Apna / Digital accounts). BAHL does not publish a card-specific salary or balance gate; the underlying account dictates entry (e.g. Digital account has no minimum balance; Apna account has no minimum balance to open but levies fees when monthly average < PKR 25,000).
Salary and balance are kept null because BAHL does not publish a single threshold for this card variant.
Annual fee verified at PKR 3,700 primary / PKR 2,700 supplementary in the SOC Jan-Jun 2026.

Account-linked card. Salary and balance changed from 0 to null: BAHL publishes no card-level threshold and the underlying current/digital accounts have no minimum balance, so '0' would have been an over-claim of explicit zero-requirement language.
Audit flagged this card; verified directly.

cards.card_name: AL Habib Digital Account Gold Debit Card
notes: Digital Account has 'No minimum balance requirement' and 'No initial deposit requirement' per the account KFS, so balance fields are explicitly 0.
Minimum age 18 per /accounts/digital.
Annual fee PKR 4,500 primary / PKR 3,500 supplementary maps to the Visa Gold debit fee in the SOC Jan-Jun 2026 (this is the Digital Account variant that issues a Visa Gold card).

cards.card_name: AL Habib Digital Account Classic Debit Card
notes: Classic variant maps to Visa Silver pricing in the SOC: PKR 3,700 primary / PKR 2,700 supplementary.
No minimum balance / no initial deposit on the digital account.
Minimum age 18 per /accounts/digital.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Issuance / annual / renewal fee on PayPak debit card is waived if PKR 5,000 monthly average balance is maintained on the AL Habib Remit Current Account; Visa-variant Remit cards follow the standard Visa Silver schedule.

notes: PKR 3,700 primary / PKR 2,700 supplementary on the /debit-cards page corresponds to the Visa Silver tariff per SOC Jan-Jun 2026 (which is what BAHL applies when a Remit account holder upgrades to a Visa card).
The default card on AL Habib Remit Current Account is the free PayPak (per /accounts/current and the Asaan Remit KFS), free if PKR 5,000 monthly average balance is maintained.
Remit account age band is 18-60 (insurance eligibility) per /accounts/current.
/debit-cards page lists PKR 3,700 / PKR 2,700 (the Visa Silver default).

Conflict: the Woman Current Account KFS lists discounted Visa rates (Visa Silver PKR 1,500 / Visa Gold PKR 2,000 / Visa Platinum PKR 4,500 / UnionPay PKR 1,500) and free PayPak (issuance only). The KFS appears to give Woman account holders a card-fee discount versus the standard /debit-cards page rate. Kept the headline /debit-cards rate (3,700) as the reported annual fee, with this conflict noted.
Woman Account has no minimum balance and no initial deposit per the KFS; age band 18-60 (insurance eligibility).
Annual fee corrected from null to PKR 3,000 primary / PKR 2,000 supplementary per the SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Section V (China UnionPay) and confirmed by the /cards comparison page.
Linked to the Apna Individual Current Account: free services tied to maintaining PKR 25,000 monthly average balance per the Apna KFS; PKR 25,000 surfaced as minimum_average_balance.
Apna account age band is 18-60 (insurance eligibility) per /accounts/current.

Annual fee corrected from null to PKR 3,000 primary / PKR 2,000 supplementary per the SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Section V (China UnionPay) and confirmed on the /cards comparison page (UPI Debit Card variant on Digital Account).
The card can be issued on Digital Account (no minimum balance) or other current accounts; without a single specific account dependency, balance is left null.
Minimum age 18 from /accounts/digital.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Issuance / annual / renewal fee waived if monthly average balance of PKR 25,000 is maintained on AL Habib Current / Current Plus / Apna Individual accounts (PKR 5,000 on AL Habib Remit account) in previous or next calendar month.

notes: Annual fee corrected from null to PKR 2,750 per the SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Section VII. PAY PAK.

Verbatim waiver text from the SOC: 'To waive issuance/annual/renewal fee on PayPak debit card on all current accounts, customers will be required to maintain monthly average balance of Rs. 25,000/-' in previous or next calendar month (PKR 5,000 on the AL Habib Remit account per the Jul-Dec 2026 SOC clarification).
PayPak is the default free card on Asaan / Apna / Remit accounts; the waiver is what makes it commonly described as 'free'.
No supplementary card option per the /cards comparison page.

gaps: Maximum age for non-insurance-tied accounts (Digital, Current, Current Plus) is not explicitly published by BAHL.
Whether Visa Gold / Silver debit cards have any specific income or balance threshold above the underlying account is not disclosed; entry is governed entirely by the account product.

The Woman Current Account KFS lists discounted Visa/UnionPay/PayPak debit-card fees (e.g. Visa Silver PKR 1,500 on Woman) that conflict with the headline /debit-cards page (PKR 3,700). Kept the public /debit-cards page value as canonical.
